title: helichrysum coralloides
intro: Helichrysum coralloides, also known as the Isle of Beauty or Yellow Hill, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum coralloides are numerous, including reducing inflammation and pain, improving skin and wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum coralloides can be found in the form of essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
